bmiFrauen.title: BMI Calculator Women
bmiFrauen.description: Calculate your BMI with women-specific interpretation notes.
bmiFrauen.content: BMI uses the same formula for everyone, but women-specific interpretation is important. Hormonal changes, life stage, and body fat distribution can change risk despite similar BMI values. Use BMI as a starting point and combine it with waist measures and body-fat estimates when needed.

faq.q: Is the BMI formula different for women?
faq.a: No, the formula is the same, but interpretation can differ due to physiological differences.
Only partially. Pregnancy-specific weight-gain guidance is more useful during that period.

faq.q: What should I use with BMI?
faq.a: Waist-to-hip ratio and body-fat estimates are useful complementary metrics.
